company.name: Novartis AG (Innovative Medicines)
company.subtitle: IM-only model | $54.5B 2025 (+8% USD; +11% cc) | Pluvicto/Kisqali/Kesimpta/Scemblix/Fabhalta growth | Entresto US LOE Jul 2025 | Top-20 brands $44.5B + Other $10B
company.cashRunway: Self-funding (~$15B+ op cash flow); Sandoz spun off Oct 2023; pure-play Innovative Medicines

market.notes: ARNI standard of care HFrEF. US LOE Jul 2025 (Mylan settled launch). Net erosion accelerating 2026+.
Approved HFpEF (LVEF below normal subgroup). Generic erosion + competition from SGLT2is.
Cosentyx PsO ~40% of brand. Class peers: Skyrizi (AbbVie IL-23 dominant), Tremfya, Stelara biosim, Bimzelx (UCB).
Cosentyx PsA ~20% of brand.
Cosentyx AS+nrAxSpA ~20% of brand.
Cosentyx HS approved 2023 (SUNSHINE/SUNRISE Ph3). ~10% of brand growing. Class peer: Bimzelx (UCB IL-17A/F).

indications.name: Polymyalgia rheumatica + Giant cell arteritis (GCA submission H1 2026)

market.notes: Cosentyx PMR + GCA Ph3 positive 2025. PMR submission H1 2026. ~10% of brand growing.

indications.name: HR+/HER2- breast cancer (1L met + adj NATALEE)

market.notes: CDK4/6 with NATALEE Ph3 adj approval Sep 2024 (broadest adj label vs Ibrance/Verzenio). 1L met MONALEESA + adj NATALEE driving. Class peers: Ibrance (Pfizer palbociclib, declining), Verzenio (Lilly abemaciclib).
First SC self-administered anti-CD20 (autoinjector monthly). Differentiated vs Ocrevus IV q6mo. Strong patient preference + DTC.
BRAF V600 melanoma 1L + adjuvant. ~50% of franchise. Includes pediatric LGG (BRAF V600+) niche absorbed.
BRAF V600+ NSCLC niche (~1-2% NSCLC). Tagged kras driver bucket as proxy (no dedicated BRAF leaf).
Anaplastic thyroid + differentiated thyroid BRAF V600.
BRAF V600+ mCRC ~5% of CRC.

assets.name: Jakavi (ruxolitinib) — JAK1/2 inhibitor (ex-US; Incyte books US as Jakafi)

market.notes: JAK1/2 inhibitor; SoC for MF. Ex-US only (Novartis); Jakafi (Incyte) US. Class peers: Inrebic, Vonjo, Ojjaara. Pelabresib combo Ph3 ongoing.
Jakavi PV 2L (HU intolerant).
GvHD ex-US. Tagged sjogrens as autoimmune proxy (no GvHD ex-cgvhd leaf in current taxonomy).

First Lu-177 PSMA-targeted radioligand. VISION 2022 post-taxane; PSMAfore 2024 expanded to pre-taxane 2L mCRPC. Class peers: Akeega (PARP+abi BRCA+), Xofigo legacy alpha. Manufacturing capacity expanding.

indications.name: Periodic fever syndromes (CAPS/TRAPS/HIDS/FMF) + Still's disease (sJIA/AOSD) + Behcet

market.notes: Anti-IL-1b for autoinflammatory syndromes. Tagged HAE area as closest autoinflammatory proxy. Niche but premium-priced; growing ~24% on Still's expansion.
Roche books US gross (~$3B); Novartis books ROW + US cross-profit share (~$1.7B). Combined global ~$4.8B 2025. Biosim pressure 2027+.
TPO-R agonist for chronic ITP. Generic eltrombopag US 2024. ~50% of brand.
SAA refractory + 1L IST combo. ~30% of brand.
HCV-thrombocytopenia legacy. Declining as HCV cured. Tagged anti_infective as closest proxy.

First-in-class BCR-ABL allosteric (STAMP) inhibitor; binds myristoyl pocket. ASC4FIRST Ph3 1L positive 2024. Class: Tasigna (Novartis 2nd gen, declining), Sprycel (BMS), Bosulif (Pfizer). Tagged cll as closest hematology bucket.

assets.name: Zolgensma (onasemnogene abeparvovec) — AAV9 SMN1 gene therapy

market.notes: One-shot AAV9 SMN1 gene therapy ($2.25M WAC). Newborn screening expanding eligibility. Class peers: Spinraza ASO + Evrysdi oral.

Sandostatin acromegaly + Cushing's + thyrotropin tumors. ~30% of brand. Class peer: Somatuline (Ipsen lanreotide). (Sandostatin total $1.2B; model splits direct-tagged brands; ROW carcinoid generics moved to heritage tail.)

Sandostatin carcinoid syndrome + functional GEP-NETs. ~70% of brand. Generic erosion accelerating. (Sandostatin total $1.2B; model splits direct-tagged brands; ROW carcinoid generics moved to heritage tail.)

Subq q6mo siRNA PCSK9 (vs Repatha/Praluent q2w mAbs). ORION-4 CV outcomes Ph3 2026 readout — transformational if positive (broader label, primary prevention). Class peers: Repatha (Amgen), Praluent (Sanofi/Regeneron), MK-0616 (Merck oral PCSK9).
2nd-gen BCR-ABL. Generic nilotinib launching; Scemblix replacing 1L. Tagged cll proxy.
Lu-177 SSTR-targeted radioligand for GEP-NETs (NETTER-1). 1L expansion (NETTER-2 2024 positive). Manufacturing capacity expanding.

indications.name: nAMD + DME + RVO + DR (Novartis ROW only)

market.notes: Anti-VEGF Fab. Novartis books ROW; Roche books US. Heavy biosim pressure (Cimerli, Byooviz, Susvimo Roche).

assets.name: Fabhalta (iptacopan) — oral Factor B inhibitor (alternative complement)

market.notes: First oral PNH treatment. Switch from anti-C5 (Soliris/Ultomiris/Crovalimab) for hemolytic + breakthrough. APPLY-PNH Ph3 2023.
First-in-class oral Factor B inhibitor for IgAN. APPLAUSE-IgAN Ph3 positive 2024. Class peers: Tarpeyo (Calliditas), atrasentan (Novartis), sparsentan (Travere).
First-in-class for C3G. APPEAR-C3G Ph3 positive 2025; submission Q4 2025.
First anti-CGRPR mAb. Class peers: Ajovy (Teva CGRP), Emgality (Lilly CGRP), Vyepti (Lundbeck CGRP IV), Nurtec/Qulipta (oral gepants). Novartis books ex-US; Amgen books US.
S1P1/5 modulator for active SPMS. Niche; class peers Gilenya (legacy generic), Zeposia (BMS), Ponvory (Janssen).
MET TKI. Class peer: Tepmetko (Merck KGaA tepotinib).

indications.name: Pediatric B-ALL + adult R/R DLBCL + R/R FL

market.notes: First FDA-approved CAR-T (2017 B-ALL pediatric; DLBCL 2018; FL 2022). Anti-CD19 autologous. Class peers: Yescarta/Tecartus (Gilead), Breyanzi (BMS). Lost share to Yescarta.
Single-chain anti-VEGF Fab. 2020 retinal vasculitis safety signal collapsed launch. Residual ROW + niche US.
Same molecule as Piqray (HR+ breast). PROS pediatric overgrowth (CLOVES, megalencephaly, Klippel-Trenaunay). Tagged hr_her2_neg proxy (no PROS taxonomy area).
Triazole antifungal vs Aspergillus + mucormycosis. 50/50 alliance with Astellas (Astellas books US, Novartis books ROW).
Signifor (pasireotide somatostatin agonist) + Isturisa (osilodrostat 11-beta-hydroxylase inhibitor).
Diovan (~$0.6B residual brand) + Exforge (~$0.7B brand FDC). Off-patent ROW-dominated.
Imatinib LOE 2016. Residual brand ROW + EU5 brand-loyal segments.

market.notes: Letrozole LOE 2011. Residual brand ROW.

indications.name: Type 2 diabetes (ROW only; never approved US)

market.notes: DPP-4 ROW-only (never approved US). Post-LOE brand loyalty in EU/Asia; declining vs SGLT2is + GLP-1s.

us.reachPct.note: DPP-4 ROW-only (never approved US). Post-LOE brand

indications.name: Solid organ transplant + uveitis + RA legacy

market.notes: Cyclosporine LOE 1990s. Residual brand ROW + niche uveitis.

us.reachPct.note: Cyclosporine LOE 1990s. Residual brand ROW + niche

assets.name: Heritage portfolio (Diovan + Exforge + Glivec + Sandimmune + others)
assets.stage: Commercial (~$7.4B; sub-top-20 brands + ROW alliance + royalties)

indications.name: Heritage tail (Diovan + Exforge + Glivec + Sandimmune + Femara + Voltaren + Galvus + Comtan + others)

market.notes: True heterogeneous tail (~$4.5B). After breakouts of Cresemba, Cushing's, Diovan/Exforge, Glivec, Femara, Galvus, Sandimmune, Aimovig, Mayzent, Tabrecta as their own assets, this captures: Comtan (entacapone PD legacy), Lescol (fluvastatin), Trileptal (oxcarbazepine epilepsy), Voltaren OTC ROW share, Voraxaze (rare oncology), Adakveo legacy (withdrawn 2023), Roche-Novartis cross-licenses, Sandoz biosim royalties (transitional), Patanol/Cosopt eye drops legacy, Tasimelteon, generic ROW erosion brands, alliance/co-promote income, plus all royalty + other income. Aligns to Novartis FY25 'Other' line (~$10B) = breakouts + this tail.

assets.name: Remibrutinib — covalent BTK inhibitor (CSU, MS, food allergy, HS)
assets.stage: Phase 3 REMIX-1/2 CSU readouts 2025 positive; submission early 2026

market.notes: Selective covalent BTKi. REMIX-1/2 Ph3 CSU positive 2025; submission early 2026. Differentiated vs Xolair (oral). Class peers: rilzabrutinib (SNY).
Ph3 RMS ongoing.

assets.name: Pelabresib — BET (BRD4) bromodomain inhibitor (myelofibrosis combo)
assets.stage: Phase 3 MANIFEST-2 (Pela+Rux 1L MF) — EU filing planned; US Ph3 planned

market.notes: BET inhibitor combo with Jakavi/Jakafi for 1L MF. MANIFEST-2 mixed (spleen yes, symptoms no). Filing complex; EU planned 2026.
Anti-BAFF-R mAb depleting B-cells. NEPTUNUS Ph3 readouts 2025; submission early 2026. First disease-modifying therapy for Sjögren's.
Ph3 SLE program.

assets.name: Atrasentan — ETA receptor antagonist (IgA nephropathy; Chinook acq)
assets.stage: Approved Apr 2024 IgAN (accelerated); Ph3 ALIGN confirmatory 2026

market.notes: ETA-selective endothelin antagonist; reduces proteinuria. Approved accelerated 2024 (PROTECT Ph3 interim). ALIGN Ph3 confirmatory 2026. Class peers: sparsentan (Travere Filspari).

assets.name: Pelacarsen (TQJ230) — Lp(a)-lowering ASO (Ionis partner)
assets.stage: Phase 3 HORIZON Lp(a) CV outcomes; readout 2026-27

market.notes: Subq mo ASO targeting hepatic LPA mRNA. Lpa>70mg/dL ASCVD pop ~64M globally. Class race: olpasiran (Amgen siRNA Ph3), zerlasiran (Silence siRNA Ph2), muvalaplin (Lilly oral).

mega_bear.narrative: Entresto LOE accelerates; Cosentyx growth slows vs Skyrizi; Pluvicto manufacturing constrains; pipeline disappoints
events: X Entresto cliff steeper than expected post Jul 2025 LOE
X Cosentyx market-share loss to Skyrizi/Bimzelx
X Pluvicto manufacturing capacity bottlenecks 1L expansion
X Remibrutinib CSU disappoints vs Xolair switch
X Leqvio ORION-4 CV outcomes mixed

bear.narrative: Entresto erosion as expected; Kisqali NATALEE adj steady; Pluvicto + Kesimpta drive growth; pipeline mixed

base.narrative: Kisqali $8B+ adj+met franchise; Pluvicto $7B+ post-PSMAfore + 1L; Kesimpta $8B+; Leqvio $5B+; Fabhalta multi-indication breakout
events: V Kisqali $8B peak across adj NATALEE + 1L met
V Leqvio $5B+ peak post ORION-4 CV outcomes 2026 positive
V Remibrutinib approved CSU 2026; MS 2028 readout

bull.narrative: Pluvicto $10B + Kisqali $10B + Kesimpta $10B + Fabhalta $7B + Leqvio $7B + Remibrutinib $5B multi-indication
events: V Pluvicto $10B peak across mCRPC + 1L hormone-sensitive + PSMA-positive expansion
V Kisqali $10B+ adj NATALEE label dominance
V Leqvio $7B post ORION-4 transformational CV outcomes
V Ianalumab Sjogren's first-in-class, IgA Sjogren's pipeline halo

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Multi-franchise dominance; Pluvicto $15B; Kisqali $12B; Kesimpta $12B; full pipeline approved; multiple expansion premium
events: V Pluvicto $15B+ across all PSMA+ prostate lines

lastData.title: FY2025 IM $54B+ (+11% cc; +5% reported). Top 5 growth drivers Pluvicto+Kisqali+Kesimpta+Scemblix+Fabhalta = $13.2B (+$3.5B vs 2024). Entresto US LOE Jul 2025 settled.
points: FY2025 Top 20 brands $44.5B (+11% cc); IM total ~$54B
Kisqali $4.78B (+57%); NATALEE adj approval Sep 2024 driving
Kesimpta $4.43B (+36%); SC anti-CD20 vs Ocrevus IV
Leqvio $1.20B (+57%); ORION-4 CV outcomes Ph3 readout 2026
Fabhalta $0.51B (+287%); first oral PNH; APPLAUSE-IgAN + APPEAR-C3G positive
Remibrutinib REMIX-1/2 CSU Ph3 positive 2025; submission early 2026
Sandoz spun off Oct 2023; this model is pure-play IM (Pharma)

nextCatalyst.title: Remibrutinib CSU NDA + Ianalumab Sjögren's submission + Leqvio ORION-4 CV readout H2
thresholds: H2 2026: Leqvio ORION-4 CV outcomes Ph3 readout (transformational)
H2 2026: Pelabresib MF combo EU filing
2027: Pelacarsen HORIZON Lp(a) CV outcomes Ph3 readout

risks: Entresto Jul 2025 US LOE: $7.75B 2025 -> ~$3-4B 2026 -> <$2B 2027 -- biggest near-term cliff
Cosentyx market-share loss to Skyrizi (AbbVie IL-23) + Bimzelx (UCB IL-17A/F) class war
Pluvicto manufacturing capacity bottlenecks 1L expansion (PSMA-617 supply)
Promacta + Tasigna LOE cliffs accelerating (~$2.7B combined declining)
Leqvio ORION-4 CV outcomes binary (transformational vs class loss)
Aimovig competitive vs CGRP class (Ajovy/Emgality + oral gepants)
Remibrutinib CSU first-mover + MS Ph3 -- vs SNY rilzabrutinib
Roche/Novartis Xolair sharing complex; biosim pressure 2027+

catalysts.title: Remibrutinib CSU NDA submission (REMIX-1/2 Ph3 positive)
catalysts._rationale: REMIX-1/2 Ph3 CSU positive 2025; submission early 2026.

catalysts.title: Ianalumab NEPTUNUS Sjögren's submission (first disease-mod)
catalysts._rationale: First disease-modifying therapy for Sjögren's; NEPTUNUS Ph3 readouts 2025.

catalysts.title: Leqvio ORION-4 Lp(a)/LDL CV outcomes Ph3 readout
catalysts._rationale: If positive, transformational primary-prevention label vs Repatha/Praluent.

catalysts.title: Pelabresib MF combo EU filing
catalysts._rationale: MANIFEST-2 mixed signals; EU filing first while US Ph3 planned.

catalysts.title: Pelacarsen HORIZON Lp(a) CV outcomes Ph3 readout
catalysts._rationale: First Lp(a)-CV outcome trial; class race vs olpasiran (Amgen).

catalysts.title: Entresto US LOE — generic launch (Mylan settled)
catalysts._rationale: US composition LOE Jul 2025; generic Mylan settlement 2024.
